en_title: The Elder Scrolls 6 Will Suffer Because of Xbox Layoffs, Bethesda Staff Say, Fearing Delays, Crunch, and Generational Talent Being Replaced by Contractors
cn_title: 贝塞斯达员工称XBOX裁员将拖累《上古卷轴6》开发
subtitle: 担忧延期、加班与外包取代
opus_summary: 多名贝塞斯达现任和前员工告诉IGN，XBOX本周裁员将对《上古卷轴6》开发造成「重大且连锁性的影响」。他们担忧项目延期、加班增加，以及资深员工被外包人员取代。

paragraphs.en: This week's devastating Xbox layoffs will have a substantial and cascading effect on Bethesda's development of The Elder Scrolls 6, multiple staff at the studio have told IGN.
paragraphs.cn: 多名贝塞斯达员工告诉IGN，本周冲击巨大的XBOX裁员将对《上古卷轴6》的开发造成「重大且连锁性的影响」。

paragraphs.en: Current and former staff said job losses across Bethesda Game Studios locations removed more than 50 employees, including key high-performing people building the long-awaited Skyrim successor. They said morale has been shattered, future crunch is more likely, and the already distant release date may be delayed.
paragraphs.cn: 为保护职业生涯而匿名发声的现任及前员工称，贝塞斯达游戏工作室各地已有超过50人失业，其中包括开发《上古卷轴5：天际》续作的关键高绩效员工。他们表示，团队士气遭到重创，未来加班风险上升，原本就遥远的发售日期也更可能延期。

paragraphs.en: Photos shared on social media showed makeshift Celebrations of Service memorials in Dallas and Rockville offices, with framed photos of laid-off staff and flowers. At least one display was later dismantled at HR's instruction.
paragraphs.cn: 社交媒体流传的照片显示，得州达拉斯和马里兰州罗克维尔办公室内出现多处临时「服务纪念」陈列，摆放被裁员工的相框照片和花束。至少有一处陈列后来按人力资源部门要求拆除。

paragraphs.en: Their loss will have a substantial and cascading effect on the game and morale of this studio, one employee said. It has been every discipline: programmers, artists, and designers. One person who has been at the company since Morrowind was cut.
paragraphs.cn: 一名员工说：「他们的离开会对游戏和工作室士气造成重大且连锁性的影响。被裁者来自各个岗位：程序员、美术和设计师。甚至有一位从《上古卷轴3：晨风》时期就在公司的人也被裁了。」

paragraphs.en: The Bethesda Games Studio Union highlighted an Xbox Player Voice post seeking to show Microsoft that fans are unhappy with the scale of layoffs. With 2,588 upvotes, it is in the top 20 user suggestions on the site.
paragraphs.cn: 贝塞斯达游戏工作室工会在社交媒体上强调了一则XBOX Player Voice反馈帖，旨在让微软看到玩家对裁员规模的不满。该帖已获2588个赞，进入该站用户建议前20名。

paragraphs.en: The layoffs are part of the 1,600 staff who lost their jobs this week under recently installed CEO Asha Sharma. Sharma called it the most significant restructure in Xbox history and said the gaming business is not healthy. Xbox is losing about one-fifth of its staff.
paragraphs.cn: 这轮裁员属于新任CEO Asha Sharma主导的本周1600人裁员计划。Sharma称这是XBOX历史上最「重大」的重组，并称微软游戏业务「并不健康」。XBOX约五分之一的员工将离开。

paragraphs.en: A further 1,600 staff will leave during the rest of the financial year as Xbox focuses on its biggest brands, such as Halo, Forza, Fallout and The Elder Scrolls. Staff nevertheless believe this will hurt TES 6.
paragraphs.cn: 本财年剩余时间还将有1600人离职，XBOX将更聚焦《光环》《极限竞速》《辐射》和《上古卷轴》等最大品牌。但员工仍认为，这些变化会损害《上古卷轴6》。

paragraphs.en: Bethesda boss Jill Braff said the layoffs and strategy shift reflect industry and business realities and are intended to put Bethesda on a more stable foundation. She said the teams must work closer together and focus on the company’s strongest franchises.
paragraphs.cn: 贝塞斯达负责人Jill Braff表示，裁员和战略调整反映行业与业务现实，目的是让贝塞斯达建立在更稳定的基础上。她称团队必须更紧密合作，并聚焦公司最强的系列。

paragraphs.en: The changes could leave Starfield out in the cold. Marvel's Blade may be affected if Microsoft sells or closes Arkane Lyon, while ZeniMax Online Studios has already signaled changes to its roadmap after layoffs. id Software also suffered significant cuts, though MachineGames survived.
paragraphs.cn: 这些变化可能令《星空》被冷落；若微软出售或关闭Arkane Lyon，《漫威刀锋战士》也可能受影响。ZeniMax Online Studios已在裁员后暗示将调整内容路线图；id Software同样遭到大幅削减，MachineGames则暂时幸免。

paragraphs.en: One developer feared cheaper contractors would replace the team, requiring onboarding for proprietary tools, causing further delays and crunch. Another said everyone had been excited about TES 6 but that the cuts had a crushing effect on morale.
paragraphs.cn: 一名开发者担忧，团队会被更便宜的合同工取代；新人员还需学习专有工具，导致更多延期和加班。另一名员工说，大家此前都很期待《上古卷轴6》，但裁员对士气造成了毁灭性打击。

paragraphs.en: The Elder Scrolls 6 is reportedly still at least two years from launch, despite having been announced around eight years ago.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管约八年前便已公布，据报道，《上古卷轴6》距离发售仍至少还有两年。

paragraphs.en: Staff said outsourced workers were already taking over work from the decimated QA department, and that colleagues were being asked to train contractors. Another said staff from ZeniMax Online Studios might fill gaps, even though that studio itself has lost 212 people.
paragraphs.cn: 员工称，被严重削减的QA部门原本的工作已由海外外包公司Keywords的人员接手，同事们甚至被要求培训新合同工。还有人称，ZeniMax Online Studios的员工可能会填补《上古卷轴6》团队空缺，尽管该工作室自身也裁掉了212人。

paragraphs.en: A staff member said the specter of layoffs would remain until workers unionized. Another said the survivors were told they were safe from the next 1,600 cuts, but that this offered little reassurance: who is to say there will not be another 1,600 next year?
paragraphs.cn: 一名员工表示，在工会化之前，裁员阴影将始终存在。另一名员工称，「幸存者」被告知不会受到接下来1600人裁员的影响，但这并不能令人安心：「谁能保证明年不会再有1600人被裁？」
